logs.message: WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'matrix_mult' (function 'matrix_mult'): Unable to schedule 'store' operation ('prod_addr_23_write_ln16', matrix_mult.cpp:16) of variable 'add_ln16_95', matrix_mult.cpp:16 on array 'prod' due to limited memory ports (II = 12). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'prod'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html
